narrative:
Fremont City 2-B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 620 registered voters, with 68.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.7 percentage points.
